# Applied Intelligence Podcast
# https://appliedintelligence.fm

## About
Applied Intelligence is a podcast about what happens when senior leaders actually try to implement AI in their organizations. Not the hype, not the theory — the real stories of what works, what doesn't, and what keeps them up at night.

## Host
Keith Richman - Serial entrepreneur and digital media operator who runs a portfolio of brands across eCommerce, content, and supplements. He's been building online businesses since the early days of the internet and is now fully AI-native.

## Content
Each episode features an in-depth conversation with a Fortune 500 executive, Chief AI Officer, or AI company founder who's in the trenches making billion-dollar bets on artificial intelligence.

## Topics Covered
- AI Infrastructure
- AI in Finance
- AI in Healthcare
- AI at Work
- AI Strategy
- AI & Jobs

## Recent Guests
- Jeff McMillan, Founder of McMillan AI (former Head of Firmwide AI at Morgan Stanley)
- Anthony Soohoo, CEO of MoneyGram
- Fredrik Hjelm, CEO of Voi Technology
- Sokratis Papafloratos, CEO of Numan
- Brendan Falk, CEO of Hercules App
- Jason Robinovitz, COO of Score at the Top

## Available On
- YouTube: youtube.com/@AppliedIntelligencePod
- Spotify
- Apple Podcasts

## Contact
